sections.title: Struck By Caught in Pre Task JHA
sections.html:
Task Description: ________________________________________________________________________________

Pre-Task Hazard Identification:

☐ Heavy equipment operation in area

☐ Backing vehicles / blind spots

☐ Overhead loads / crane lifts

☐ Excavation / trenching activities

☐ Material handling / staging

☐ Traffic control / public roads

☐ Pinch points / rotating parts

☐ Unsecured materials / tools

☐ Congested work area

☐ Poor visibility / lighting

Required PPE:

☐ Hard Hat

☐ Safety Glasses

☐ High-Visibility Vest (Class 2/3)

☐ Steel/Composite Toe Boots

☐ Work Gloves

☐ Hearing Protection

☐ Face Shield

☐ Fall Protection

Job Hazard Analysis:

Step #

Task Step Description

Potential Hazard

Hazard Control Measure

Responsible Party

1

Mobilize equipment to work area

Struck by moving equipment, blind spots

Use spotter when backing, high-vis vests required, establish exclusion zone

Operator / Spotter

2

Unload materials from delivery truck

Crushed by falling materials, pinch points

Inspect rigging, stay out of fall zone, use tag lines, clear communication

Rigger / Operator

3

Excavation and trenching

Caught in cave-in, struck by excavator bucket

Shoring/shielding in place, stay out of swing radius, barricade open trenches

Competent Person

4

Working near active roadway

Struck by public traffic

Set up proper traffic control plan (MUTCD), use concrete barriers, flaggers

Traffic Control Supervisor

5

Operating hand/power tools

Caught in rotating parts, struck by flying debris

Guards in place, proper PPE (face shield), no loose clothing/jewelry

Worker

6

7

8

9

10
